title: rubus conchyliatus
intro: Rubus conchyliatus, also known as the Raspberry Bramble or Yellow Raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family, characterized by its yellowish-green foliage and small yellowish flowers. The medicinal properties of Rubus conchyliatus lie in its high antioxidant content, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and antiviral agent. Rubus conchyliatus can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, with its herbal preparations often used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues.
